permits.description: This renovation project involves converting four individual units into a single living space through comprehensive rehabilitation and alterations construction. The scope includes demolishing interior walls, structural enhancements, upgrading plumbing and electrical systems, installing modern finishes, renovating kitchens and bathrooms, and ensuring compliance with accessibility standards. The goal is to create a unified and contemporary living environment.
